tldr: Move your MMP from Airbridge to Apptrove (Trackier) when you want a budget-friendlier attribution stack with bundled fraud prevention, accepting a smaller partner catalog and brand.
why_switch: Apptrove typically has a lower price point than Tier-1 MMPs.
Fraud prevention bundled with attribution rather than as a separate add-on.
Good fit for app marketers focused on India, MENA, and LATAM growth.
Reasonable feature parity for core install and in-app event tracking.
what_to_export: Raw install, in-app event, and postback data for required retention
Tracking link / campaign URL inventory and naming conventions
Custom event names, parameters, and revenue mapping
Integrated ad networks and partner-specific settings
Postback URLs and auth tokens for downstream systems
Deferred deep linking configuration and routes
API credentials used by BI or data warehouse pipelines
export_method: Use Airbridge's dashboard or data export APIs to pull raw events, tracking link definitions, and partner configurations. Document your event taxonomy, attribution windows, and deep link routes — these become the spec you rebuild on Apptrove. For specific export endpoints and limits, refer to Airbridge's official documentation.
import_method: Sign up for Apptrove, register your apps, and integrate the Apptrove SDK on iOS, Android, and any web surfaces, ideally in parallel with Airbridge for a validation period. Rebuild tracking links, set up partner integrations one by one, configure postbacks, and re-implement deferred deep links. Validate test installs and revenue events before pointing paid traffic at Apptrove. Use Apptrove's official docs for exact SDK and API specifics.

concept_mapping.note: URL parameters and macros differ; rebuild per partner.
Catalog is smaller; verify each network is supported before cutover.
Reimplement routing rules and test on fresh installs.
Bundled but with different signals; re-tune thresholds.

gotchas: Confirm every ad network you rely on is supported on Apptrove before committing.
Historical attribution data does not move between MMPs.
Run both SDKs in parallel during validation to catch event-mapping drift.
SKAN 4 / iOS privacy features may have feature gaps — check current support.
Smaller brand may mean fewer co-marketing assets and partner integrations available.
Documentation quality varies across modules — pilot small flows first.

email.subject: Plan: migrate MMP from Airbridge to Apptrove
email.body:
Hi team,

I'm proposing we move our mobile attribution from Airbridge to Apptrove. The case is cost plus bundled fraud prevention; the trade-off is a smaller partner catalog.

Work includes SDK swap on iOS and Android, rebuilding tracking links and event taxonomy, re-integrating each ad network, and re-implementing deferred deep links. Before we commit, I'll confirm every active ad partner is supported on Apptrove.

Estimated effort: 2-5 weeks with parallel SDK validation. Historical reports will stay on Airbridge.

Thanks
